Please refine predictions on Day 2013-11-11 based on the previous thorough feedback. To enhance performance, the overall prediction error should be decreased. The prediction should match the function of the real traffic. The prediction should be complete for each timestamp and match the format. More accurate numerical time series prediction methods should be considered, including numerical methods, hybrid methods such as Seasonal ARIMA and LSTM+ARIMA combinations.
